Analysis of cell samples

2026-03-13

library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(readxl)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(cowplot)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(DirichletReg)
set.seed(2026)

Import data

load("../data/raw/rnaseq_hersh.Rdata")

tet2_bi <- read_xlsx("../data/raw/20260305_TET2_MDS_share.xlsx") |> 
  filter(TET2bi == 1) |> 
  pull(ID)

who_levels <- c("MDS-TP53", "MDS-SF3B1",  "MDS-5q", "MDS-IB1",  "MDS-IB2",  "MDS-LB")
subgroups <- c( "Complex",  "SF3B1",      "del5q",  "MDS-IB1",  "MDS-IB2",  "Low blasts",
                "TET2 biallelic", "TET2 monoallelic", "STAG2","7-", "EZH2")

sample_metadata <- colData(se_hersh) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  select(-SEX, -AGE, -Exam_Array) |> 
  rename_with(str_to_snake) |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample") |> 
  select(sample, who, bm_blast, wbc, hb, plt, ipssm, sub_group) |> 
  mutate(who = factor(who, levels = who_levels)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(who)) |> 
  mutate(
    sub_group = case_when(
      sub_group != "Unknown TET2" ~ sub_group, 
      sub_group ==  "Unknown TET2" & sample %in% tet2_bi ~ "TET2 biallelic", 
      sub_group == "Unknown TET2" & !sample %in% tet2_bi ~ "TET2 monoallelic"
    ), 
    sub_group = factor(sub_group, levels = subgroups)
  )
types_palette <- c(
  "hspc" = "#984EA3", 
  "dc_monocytic_gmp" = "#4DAF4A" ,
  "megakaryocytic_erythroid" = "#E41A1C", 
  "early_lymphoid_bcell" = "#377EB8",
  "t_nk" = "#FF7F00"
)

types <- names(types_palette)
  
fractions <- Sys.glob("../data/cibersortx_results/CIBERSORTx_Job2_Results.csv") |> 
  read_csv(show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  select(sample = Mixture, all_of(types)) 

table(as.logical(as.matrix(column_to_rownames(fractions, "sample")) == 0))
## 
## FALSE  TRUE 
##  3358    22

Exploratory plots

Barplots, with rows ordered by hierarchical clustering.

fractions_matrix <- fractions |> 
  column_to_rownames("sample") |> 
  as.matrix()  

clust <- fractions_matrix |> 
  dist() |> 
  hclust() 

hclust_order <- clust$order |> 
  set_names(clust$labels)

base_barplot <- sample_metadata |> 
  filter(!is.na(sub_group)) |> 
  select(sample, sub_group, who) |> 
  inner_join(fractions, by = "sample") |> 
  mutate(
    hclust_order = hclust_order[sample], 
    sample = fct_reorder(sample, hclust_order)
    ) |> 
  pivot_longer(all_of(types), names_to = "cell_type", values_to = "fraction") |> 
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = types)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y = sample, x = fraction, fill = cell_type)) +
  geom_col(color = NA) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = types_palette) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), 
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0), 
    strip.clip = "off", 
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 1),
    plot.title.position = "plot", 
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
    ) 
stacked_barplot_by_subgroup <- base_barplot +
  facet_grid(sub_group ~ . , scales = "free", space = "free") +
  ggtitle("Subgroup")

stacked_barplot_by_who <- base_barplot +
  facet_grid(who ~ . , scales = "free", space = "free") +
  ggtitle("WHO 2022 classification")

stacked_barplot <- plot_grid(
  # Plots
  plot_grid(
    stacked_barplot_by_subgroup + theme(legend.position = "none"),
    stacked_barplot_by_who  + theme(legend.position = "none"),
    ncol = 2
  ), 
  # Legend
  get_legend(stacked_barplot_by_subgroup), 
  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(15, 1)
)
  
stacked_barplot

ggsave(
  "../figures/stacked_barplot_cell_fractions.pdf",
  stacked_barplot,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  units = "in"
  )
## systemfonts and textshaping have been compiled with different versions of Freetype. Because of this, textshaping will not use the font cache provided by systemfonts

PCAs of the cell fractions

pca <- prcomp(fractions_matrix)

rotation <- pca$rotation |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column("cell_type") |> 
  mutate(cell_type = str_replace_all(cell_type, "_", "\n"))

importances <- summary(pca)$importance[2,] |> 
  signif(2)

base_pca <- pca$x |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample") |> 
  left_join(sample_metadata, by = "sample") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = rotation, 
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2)
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = rotation, 
    size = 3,
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = cell_type)
  ) +
  xlab(glue("PC1 ({importances[1]})")) + 
  ylab(glue("PC2 ({importances[2]})")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    )

Colored by subgroup

pca_by_subgroup <- base_pca

pca_by_subgroup$layers <- c(
  geom_point(aes(color = sub_group)), 
  pca_by_subgroup$layers
)

pca_by_subgroup <- pca_by_subgroup +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set3")

pca_by_subgroup
## Warning: Removed 14 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

ggsave(
  "../figures/pca_cell_fractions_by_subgroup.png",
  pca_by_subgroup,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  units = "in"
  )
## Warning: Removed 14 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

  • SF3B1 are enriched in erythroid. This is expected and acts as a sanity check.

  • del5qs are enriched in lymphocytes. These have an inflammatory biology so it checks out.

pca_by_subgroup_hl <- base_pca

pca_by_subgroup_hl$layers <- c(
  geom_point(
    aes(
      color = sub_group, 
      alpha = sub_group %in% c("TET2 biallelic", "TET2 monoallelic", "STAG2","7-", "EZH2"), 
      ),
    ), 
  pca_by_subgroup_hl$layers
)

pca_by_subgroup_hl <- pca_by_subgroup_hl +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = 0:1) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pca_by_subgroup_hl
## Warning: Removed 14 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

Focusing on the newly defined groups:

  • TET2bi is enriched in HPSCs and myeloid lineage, while depleted in erythroid/megakaryocytic.

  • STAG2 is enriched in HSPCs, and depleted in eveythig else “leukemic stem cell-like”.

Colored by WHO 2022

pca_by_who <- base_pca

pca_by_who$layers <- c(
  geom_point(aes(fill = who), color = "lightgrey", shape = 21), 
  pca_by_subgroup$layers
)

pca_by_who <- pca_by_who +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")

pca_by_who

ggsave(
  "../figures/pca_cell_fractions_by_who.png",
  pca_by_who,
  width = 10,
  height = 10,
  units = "in"
  )

Boxplots of cell fractions

base_boxplot <- fractions |>
  inner_join(sample_metadata, by = "sample") |> 
  pivot_longer(all_of(types), values_to = "fraction", names_to = "cell_type") |> 
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = types)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type, y = fraction, color = cell_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.5, outlier.size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = types_palette) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
    strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1), 
    legend.position = "bottom",
  )

boxplot <- plot_grid(
  # Plots
  plot_grid(
    base_boxplot + facet_grid(~sub_group) +ggtitle("Subgroup") + theme(legend.position = "none"),
    base_boxplot + facet_grid(~who) + ggtitle("WHO") + theme(legend.position = "none"),
    ncol = 1
  ), 
  # Legend
  get_legend(base_boxplot), 
  ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(15, 1)
)
  
boxplot

ggsave(
  "../figures/boxplot_cell_fractions.pdf",
  boxplot,
  width = 9,
  height = 9,
  units = "in"
  )
boxplot_by_group <- fractions |>
  inner_join(sample_metadata, by = "sample") |> 
  pivot_longer(all_of(types), values_to = "fraction", names_to = "cell_type") |> 
  pivot_longer(c(sub_group, who), names_to = "classification", values_to = "group") |> 
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = types)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = group, y = fraction, color = group)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = rep(brewer.pal(n = 9, "Set1"), 2)) +
  facet_grid(classification ~ cell_type, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.5, outlier.size = 0.5) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
  )
  
boxplot_by_group

ggsave(
  "../figures/boxplot_by_group_cell_fractions.pdf",
  boxplot_by_group,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  units = "in"
  )

Dirichlet regression

First we evaluate if there are zeroes or NAs

sum(fractions_matrix == 0)
## [1] 22
sum(is.na(fractions_matrix))
## [1] 0

We add a pseudocount

pseudocount <- unique(sort(as.double(fractions_matrix)))[2]
pseudoc_matrix <- fractions_matrix + pseudocount
pseudoc_matrix <- pseudoc_matrix / rowSums(pseudoc_matrix)

Subgroup

We set Low blasts as the baseline group.

dr_df <- as.data.frame(pseudoc_matrix) |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample") |> 
  inner_join(select(sample_metadata, sample, sub_group), by = "sample") |> 
  select(sub_group, all_of(types)) |> 
  mutate(sub_group = fct_relevel(sub_group, "Low blasts"))

Y <- DR_data(select(dr_df, -sub_group))

fit <- DirichReg(
  Y ~ sub_group,
  data = dr_df,
  control = list(iterlim = 1e9, tol1 = 1e-5, tol2 = 1e-10 )
)

summary(fit)
## Call:
## DirichReg(formula = Y ~ sub_group, data = dr_df, control = list(iterlim =
## 1e+09, tol1 = 1e-05, tol2 = 1e-10))
## 
## Standardized Residuals:
##                               Min       1Q   Median      3Q     Max
## hspc                      -2.4268  -0.6446   0.0127  0.6721  4.4133
## dc_monocytic_gmp          -3.0358  -0.6454   0.1038  0.6666  2.4652
## megakaryocytic_erythroid  -2.5901  -0.8770   0.0067  0.8939  6.5689
## early_lymphoid_bcell      -1.7302  -0.4889  -0.2127  0.0985  1.7837
## t_nk                      -1.9003  -0.6913  -0.2984  0.4085  7.2004
## 
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 1: hspc
##                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                1.05526    0.07739  13.635  < 2e-16 ***
## sub_groupComplex          -0.12339    0.12606  -0.979  0.32766    
## sub_groupSF3B1            -0.28910    0.10081  -2.868  0.00413 ** 
## sub_groupdel5q            -0.09373    0.10955  -0.856  0.39222    
## sub_groupMDS-IB1          -0.01178    0.15350  -0.077  0.93883    
## sub_groupMDS-IB2           0.43285    0.19717   2.195  0.02814 *  
## sub_groupTET2 biallelic    0.53929    0.12031   4.483 7.38e-06 ***
## sub_groupTET2 monoallelic  0.29086    0.15139   1.921  0.05470 .  
## sub_groupSTAG2             0.39685    0.17890   2.218  0.02654 *  
## sub_group7-               -0.34294    0.38674  -0.887  0.37521    
## sub_groupEZH2              0.12401    0.41440   0.299  0.76474    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 2: dc_monocytic_gmp
##                            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                1.851745   0.073455  25.209  < 2e-16 ***
## sub_groupComplex          -0.940983   0.123810  -7.600 2.96e-14 ***
## sub_groupSF3B1            -0.020033   0.094814  -0.211    0.833    
## sub_groupdel5q            -0.029355   0.103624  -0.283    0.777    
## sub_groupMDS-IB1           0.024605   0.145492   0.169    0.866    
## sub_groupMDS-IB2          -0.090258   0.192965  -0.468    0.640    
## sub_groupTET2 biallelic    0.684246   0.114852   5.958 2.56e-09 ***
## sub_groupTET2 monoallelic  0.005835   0.146108   0.040    0.968    
## sub_groupSTAG2            -0.235396   0.175884  -1.338    0.181    
## sub_group7-               -0.665706   0.372572  -1.787    0.074 .  
## sub_groupEZH2             -0.465873   0.408060  -1.142    0.254    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 3: megakaryocytic_erythroid
##                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                1.76377    0.07379  23.901  < 2e-16 ***
## sub_groupComplex          -0.69330    0.12304  -5.635 1.75e-08 ***
## sub_groupSF3B1             0.02552    0.09516   0.268   0.7886    
## sub_groupdel5q            -0.14951    0.10447  -1.431   0.1524    
## sub_groupMDS-IB1          -0.22184    0.14770  -1.502   0.1331    
## sub_groupMDS-IB2          -0.40285    0.19721  -2.043   0.0411 *  
## sub_groupTET2 biallelic   -0.29343    0.11860  -2.474   0.0134 *  
## sub_groupTET2 monoallelic -0.71513    0.15207  -4.703 2.57e-06 ***
## sub_groupSTAG2            -1.07625    0.18566  -5.797 6.75e-09 ***
## sub_group7-               -0.33038    0.36685  -0.901   0.3678    
## sub_groupEZH2             -0.74842    0.41869  -1.788   0.0739 .  
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 4: early_lymphoid_bcell
##                            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                1.440468   0.075239  19.145  < 2e-16 ***
## sub_groupComplex          -0.537845   0.124928  -4.305 1.67e-05 ***
## sub_groupSF3B1             0.005881   0.097049   0.061   0.9517    
## sub_groupdel5q            -0.014754   0.106125  -0.139   0.8894    
## sub_groupMDS-IB1          -0.017075   0.149266  -0.114   0.9089    
## sub_groupMDS-IB2          -0.225762   0.199542  -1.131   0.2579    
## sub_groupTET2 biallelic    0.137699   0.119007   1.157   0.2472    
## sub_groupTET2 monoallelic -0.339268   0.152307  -2.228   0.0259 *  
## sub_groupSTAG2            -0.742305   0.186101  -3.989 6.64e-05 ***
## sub_group7-               -0.615734   0.382882  -1.608   0.1078    
## sub_groupEZH2             -0.504050   0.421470  -1.196   0.2317    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 5: t_nk
##                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)                0.92503    0.07823  11.825  < 2e-16 ***
## sub_groupComplex          -0.21647    0.12800  -1.691 0.090814 .  
## sub_groupSF3B1            -0.05695    0.10109  -0.563 0.573190    
## sub_groupdel5q             0.53179    0.10816   4.917 8.79e-07 ***
## sub_groupMDS-IB1          -0.07469    0.15577  -0.479 0.631601    
## sub_groupMDS-IB2           0.03582    0.20414   0.175 0.860699    
## sub_groupTET2 biallelic    0.12305    0.12370   0.995 0.319833    
## sub_groupTET2 monoallelic -0.25113    0.15792  -1.590 0.111791    
## sub_groupSTAG2            -0.67646    0.19335  -3.499 0.000468 ***
## sub_group7-               -0.30077    0.38968  -0.772 0.440201    
## sub_groupEZH2             -0.23522    0.43046  -0.546 0.584753    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Significance codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Log-likelihood: 3282 on 55 df (194 BFGS + 3 NR Iterations)
## AIC: -6453, BIC: -6206
## Number of Observations: 662
## Link: Log
## Parametrization: common

Bootstrap, to obtain confidence intervals.

WHO 2022

We use MDS-LB as the baseline group

dr_df <- as.data.frame(pseudoc_matrix) |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample") |> 
  left_join(select(sample_metadata, sample, who), by = "sample") |> 
  select(who, all_of(types)) |> 
  mutate(who = fct_relevel(who, "MDS-LB"))

Y <- DR_data(select(dr_df, -who))

fit <- DirichReg(
  Y ~ who,
  data = dr_df, 
  control = list(iterlim = 1e9, tol1 = 1e-5, tol2 = 1e-10 )
)

summary(fit)
## Call:
## DirichReg(formula = Y ~ who, data = dr_df, control = list(iterlim = 1e+09, tol1
## = 1e-05, tol2 = 1e-10))
## 
## Standardized Residuals:
##                               Min       1Q   Median      3Q     Max
## hspc                      -2.0714  -0.6495  -0.0306  0.6597  3.4731
## dc_monocytic_gmp          -3.0642  -0.6093   0.1438  0.7030  2.4507
## megakaryocytic_erythroid  -2.8340  -0.8639   0.0109  0.8727  6.2970
## early_lymphoid_bcell      -1.2885  -0.4836  -0.2327  0.0688  1.8057
## t_nk                      -1.8584  -0.7127  -0.2761  0.3566  7.2013
## 
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 1: hspc
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   1.12990    0.06876  16.432  < 2e-16 ***
## whoMDS-TP53  -0.33694    0.13675  -2.464   0.0137 *  
## whoMDS-SF3B1 -0.40722    0.09939  -4.097 4.18e-05 ***
## whoMDS-5q    -0.23861    0.10916  -2.186   0.0288 *  
## whoMDS-IB1   -0.04141    0.09813  -0.422   0.6730    
## whoMDS-IB2    0.06562    0.10528   0.623   0.5331    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 2: dc_monocytic_gmp
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   1.84940    0.06566  28.168  < 2e-16 ***
## whoMDS-TP53  -0.99870    0.13474  -7.412 1.24e-13 ***
## whoMDS-SF3B1  0.02610    0.09323   0.280    0.780    
## whoMDS-5q    -0.10936    0.10337  -1.058    0.290    
## whoMDS-IB1   -0.09267    0.09383  -0.988    0.323    
## whoMDS-IB2   -0.10647    0.10125  -1.052    0.293    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 3: megakaryocytic_erythroid
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   1.69206    0.06621  25.555  < 2e-16 ***
## whoMDS-TP53  -0.71496    0.13402  -5.335 9.57e-08 ***
## whoMDS-SF3B1  0.23417    0.09351   2.504   0.0123 *  
## whoMDS-5q    -0.12865    0.10436  -1.233   0.2177    
## whoMDS-IB1   -0.46380    0.09583  -4.840 1.30e-06 ***
## whoMDS-IB2   -0.70740    0.10462  -6.762 1.36e-11 ***
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 4: early_lymphoid_bcell
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   1.41506    0.06735  21.009  < 2e-16 ***
## whoMDS-TP53  -0.59281    0.13581  -4.365 1.27e-05 ***
## whoMDS-SF3B1  0.11499    0.09534   1.206   0.2278    
## whoMDS-5q    -0.05547    0.10592  -0.524   0.6005    
## whoMDS-IB1   -0.18954    0.09663  -1.961   0.0498 *  
## whoMDS-IB2   -0.49296    0.10566  -4.666 3.08e-06 ***
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 5: t_nk
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   0.89509    0.07009  12.771  < 2e-16 ***
## whoMDS-TP53  -0.25731    0.13872  -1.855   0.0636 .  
## whoMDS-SF3B1  0.01204    0.09950   0.121   0.9037    
## whoMDS-5q     0.50675    0.10750   4.714 2.43e-06 ***
## whoMDS-IB1   -0.13335    0.10042  -1.328   0.1842    
## whoMDS-IB2   -0.27272    0.10900  -2.502   0.0124 *  
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Significance codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Log-likelihood: 3187 on 30 df (166 BFGS + 3 NR Iterations)
## AIC: -6314, BIC: -6179
## Number of Observations: 662
## Link: Log
## Parametrization: common

Hematogram

We predict the hematological clinical variables, scaling them first with z-score

hemato_vars <- c("bm_blast","wbc","hb","plt")

hematogram <- sample_metadata |> 
  select(sample, all_of(hemato_vars)) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  column_to_rownames("sample") |> 
  as.matrix() |> 
  scale() |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample")

dr_df <- as.data.frame(pseudoc_matrix) |> 
  rownames_to_column("sample") |> 
  left_join(hematogram, by = "sample")

Y <- DR_data(select(dr_df, -all_of(hemato_vars), -sample))

fit <- DirichReg(
  as.formula(glue("Y ~ {paste(hemato_vars, collapse = ' + ')}")),
  data = dr_df, 
  control = list(iterlim = 1e9, tol1 = 1e-5, tol2 = 1e-10 )
)

s <- summary(fit)

s
## Call:
## DirichReg(formula = as.formula(glue("Y ~ {paste(hemato_vars, collapse = ' +
## ')}")), data = dr_df, control = list(iterlim = 1e+09, tol1 = 1e-05, tol2 =
## 1e-10))
## 
## Standardized Residuals:
##                               Min       1Q   Median      3Q     Max
## hspc                      -2.3633  -0.6614  -0.0386  0.6692  5.8912
## dc_monocytic_gmp          -3.1880  -0.5577   0.1319  0.6604  2.3425
## megakaryocytic_erythroid  -2.3042  -0.8356  -0.0154  0.8957  6.8954
## early_lymphoid_bcell      -1.3598  -0.4784  -0.2208  0.0534  1.9069
## t_nk                      -1.6996  -0.7485  -0.2481  0.4312  7.7017
## 
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 1: hspc
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  0.945368   0.032924  28.713  < 2e-16 ***
## bm_blast     0.205670   0.033298   6.177 6.55e-10 ***
## wbc          0.111355   0.039356   2.829  0.00466 ** 
## hb           0.003726   0.032686   0.114  0.90923    
## plt         -0.008935   0.040611  -0.220  0.82586    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 2: dc_monocytic_gmp
##             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  1.69121    0.03126  54.094  < 2e-16 ***
## bm_blast     0.05754    0.03189   1.804 0.071189 .  
## wbc          0.11243    0.03053   3.683 0.000231 ***
## hb           0.14841    0.02925   5.074 3.89e-07 ***
## plt          0.07311    0.03091   2.366 0.018000 *  
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 3: megakaryocytic_erythroid
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  1.409060   0.031811  44.294  < 2e-16 ***
## bm_blast    -0.199363   0.034605  -5.761 8.36e-09 ***
## wbc         -0.004802   0.037823  -0.127   0.8990    
## hb           0.006838   0.032847   0.208   0.8351    
## plt          0.071701   0.026906   2.665   0.0077 ** 
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 4: early_lymphoid_bcell
##             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  1.22751    0.03219  38.129  < 2e-16 ***
## bm_blast    -0.08649    0.03388  -2.552  0.01070 *  
## wbc          0.10029    0.03626   2.766  0.00568 ** 
## hb           0.08567    0.03291   2.603  0.00925 ** 
## plt          0.05021    0.03130   1.604  0.10874    
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Beta-Coefficients for variable no. 5: t_nk
##             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)  0.83606    0.03320  25.182  < 2e-16 ***
## bm_blast    -0.02067    0.03539  -0.584    0.559    
## wbc          0.13471    0.03360   4.010 6.08e-05 ***
## hb           0.05127    0.03401   1.508    0.132    
## plt          0.12607    0.03057   4.124 3.72e-05 ***
## ------------------------------------------------------------------
## Significance codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Log-likelihood: 2984 on 25 df (192 BFGS + 3 NR Iterations)
## AIC: -5918, BIC: -5807
## Number of Observations: 631
## Link: Log
## Parametrization: common
s$coef.mat |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  split(unlist(map2(s$n.vars, s$varnames, ~rep(.y, .x)))) |> 
  bind_rows(.id = "cell_type") |> 
  rownames_to_column("measure") |> 
  mutate(
    cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = types), 
    measure = str_split_i(measure, "\\.", 1), 
    Estimate = if_else(`Pr(>|z|)` < 0.05, Estimate, NA)
    ) |> 
  filter(measure != "X") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = measure, y = cell_type, fill = Estimate)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = signif(Estimate, 2))) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Spectral") 
## Warning: Removed 8 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_text()`).

Coefficients of each cell type vs clinical measurements. Only significant (pvalue < 0.05) estimates are shown.
